controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity, transaction, or item
controls.control_description:
Chapter I - Preliminary
Note: Mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in these Directions does
not imply that it is permitted, and the bank shall refer to the extant statutory and
regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an
activity, transaction, or item.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the extant statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity, transaction, or item

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks -
Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (local area banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective from the date of issue
controls.control_description: These Directions shall become effective from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be applicable to Local Area Banks
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to local area banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meaning as assigned to them below: (1) 'cash reserve ratio (crr)' shall have the same meaning as defined in the reserve bank of india (local
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein
shall bear the meaning as assigned to them below:
(1) 'Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR)' shall have the same meaning as defined in
the Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Cash Reserve Ratio and
Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meaning as assigned to them below: (1) 'cash reserve ratio (crr)' shall have the same meaning as defined in the reserve bank of india (local

controls.control_objective: To ensure the risk that a bank will not be able to meet efficiently the expected and unexpected current and future cash <image> flows and collateral needs witho
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Funding Liquidity Risk' means the risk that a bank will not be able to
meet efficiently the expected and unexpected current and future cash
<image>
flows and collateral needs without affecting either its daily operations or its
financial condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the risk that a bank will not be able to meet efficiently the expected and unexpected current and future cash <image> flows and collateral needs witho

controls.control_objective: To ensure risk where changes in market interest rates might adversely affect a bank's financial condition
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Interest Rate Risk (IRR)' means risk where changes in market interest
rates might adversely affect a bank's financial condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to risk where changes in market interest rates might adversely affect a bank's financial condition

controls.control_objective: To ensure the risk that a bank cannot easily offset or eliminate a position at the prevailing market price because of inadequate market depth or market disrupti
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Market Liquidity Risk' means the risk that a bank cannot easily offset or
eliminate a position at the prevailing market price because of inadequate
market depth or market disruption.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the risk that a bank cannot easily offset or eliminate a position at the prevailing market price because of inadequate market depth or market disrupti

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in reserve bank of india (local area banks - cash reserve ratio and statutory liquidity ratio) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(6) 'Statutory Liquidity Ratio (SLR)' shall have the same meaning as
defined in Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Cash Reserve
Ratio and Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in reserve bank of india (local area banks - cash reserve ratio and statutory liquidity ratio) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations
made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

controls.control_objective: To ensure have overall responsibility for management of risks and shall decide the risk management policy
controls.control_description:
The Board shall have overall responsibility for management of risks and shall
decide the risk management policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have overall responsibility for management of risks and shall decide the risk management policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure set limits for liquidity, interest rate, foreign exchange, and equity price risks
controls.control_description:
The Board shall set limits for liquidity, interest rate, foreign exchange, and
equity price risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set limits for liquidity, interest rate, foreign exchange, and equity price risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a management committee of the board or any other specific committee to oversee the implementation of the asset liability management (alm) s
controls.control_description:
The Board shall constitute a Management Committee of the Board or any other
specific committee to oversee the implementation of the Asset Liability
Management (ALM) system and review its functioning periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a management committee of the board or any other specific committee to oversee the implementation of the asset liability management (alm) s

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets beyond 1-28 days of the structural liquidity
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative
mismatches (running total) across all time buckets beyond 1-28 days of the
structural liquidity statement (SLS).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets beyond 1-28 days of the structural liquidity

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, and other parameters of the 'trading book' in line with the reserve bank of in
controls.control_description:
The Board / Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO) shall approve the
volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, and other
parameters of the 'Trading Book' in line with the Reserve Bank of India (Local
Area Banks - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment Portfolio)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, and other parameters of the 'trading book' in line with the reserve bank of in

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the prudential limits on 'gaps' across individual time buckets for measurement of interest rate sensitivity
controls.control_description:
The Board / Management Committee shall approve the prudential limits on
'Gaps' across individual time buckets for measurement of interest rate
sensitivity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the prudential limits on 'gaps' across individual time buckets for measurement of interest rate sensitivity

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve prudent level of earnings at risk (ear) or net interest margin (nim) based on their views on interest rate movements
controls.control_description:
The Board / Management Committee shall approve prudent level of Earnings at
Risk (EaR) or Net Interest Margin (NIM) based on their views on interest rate
movements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve prudent level of earnings at risk (ear) or net interest margin (nim) based on their views on interest rate movements

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the estimation of the behavioural pattern, embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, and other aspects related to classification of demand dep
controls.control_description:
The Board / ALCO shall approve the estimation of the behavioural pattern,
embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, and other aspects related to
classification of demand deposits into core and volatile portion on the basis of
past data / empirical studies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the estimation of the behavioural pattern, embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, and other aspects related to classification of demand dep

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed, basis feedback on the interest rate risk faced by the bank
controls.control_description:
Top Management / Board shall formulate corrective measures and devise
suitable strategies wherever needed, basis feedback on the interest rate risk
faced by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed, basis feedback on the interest rate risk faced by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure serve as a benchmark for alm systems in a bank
controls.control_description: These Directions shall serve as a benchmark for ALM systems in a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to serve as a benchmark for alm systems in a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, interest rate, foreign exchange (forex), and equity and commodity price
controls.control_description:
ALM,
among other functions concerned with risk management, shall provide a
dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, interest
rate, foreign exchange (forex), and equity and commodity price risks of a bank
that needs to be closely integrated with the bank's business strategy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to provide a dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, interest rate, foreign exchange (forex), and equity and commodity price

controls.control_objective: To ensure also involve assessment of various types of risks and dynamically altering the bank's portfolio to manage the risks
controls.control_description:
It shall
also involve assessment of various types of risks and dynamically altering the
bank's portfolio to manage the risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also involve assessment of various types of risks and dynamically altering the bank's portfolio to manage the risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest on three pillars: (1) alm information systems which comprise of
controls.control_description:
The ALM shall rest on three pillars:
(1) ALM Information Systems which comprise of
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest on three pillars: (1) alm information systems which comprise of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be supported by specific risk policies and tolerance limits
controls.control_description: ALM shall be supported by specific risk policies and tolerance limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be supported by specific risk policies and tolerance limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be built on sound internal controls, with necessary information <image> system as back up
controls.control_description:
The ALM
framework shall be built on sound internal controls, with necessary information
<image>
system as back up.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be built on sound internal controls, with necessary information <image> system as back up

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure the availability of adequate and accurate information with expedience
controls.control_description:
The ALM framework shall ensure the availability of
adequate and accurate information with expedience.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure the availability of adequate and accurate information with expedience

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for integrating basic operations and strategic decision making with risk management, along with successful implementation of the risk m
controls.control_description:
The Top Management of the bank (direct reporting to the MD & CEO and / or
Board) shall be responsible for integrating basic operations and strategic
decision making with risk management, along with successful implementation
of the risk management process.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for integrating basic operations and strategic decision making with risk management, along with successful implementation of the risk m

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute an alco consisting of the top management including ceo, which shall be responsible for ensuring adherence to the limits set by the board as
controls.control_description:
Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO)
(1) A bank shall constitute an ALCO consisting of the Top Management
including CEO, which shall be responsible for ensuring adherence to the
limits set by the Board as well as for deciding the business strategy of the
bank (on the assets and liabilities sides) in line with the bank's budget and
decided risk management objectives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute an alco consisting of the top management including ceo, which shall be responsible for ensuring adherence to the limits set by the board as

controls.control_objective: To ensure depend on the size of each bank, business mix and organisational complexity
controls.control_description:
(2) The size (number of members) of the ALCO shall depend on the size of
each bank, business mix and organisational complexity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to depend on the size of each bank, business mix and organisational complexity

controls.control_objective: To ensure head the alco
controls.control_description:
The CEO / CMD
or the Executive Director of the bank shall head the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to head the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the heads of investment, credit, treasury, international banking, risk management, economic research, and other members as deemed suitable
controls.control_description:
Its members
may include the heads of Investment, Credit, Treasury, International
Banking, Risk Management, Economic Research, and other members as
deemed suitable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the heads of investment, credit, treasury, international banking, risk management, economic research, and other members as deemed suitable

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide the frequency for holding its alco meetings
controls.control_description:
A bank shall decide the frequency for holding its ALCO
meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide the frequency for holding its alco meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet planning from risk - return perspective, including the strategic management of interest rate a
controls.control_description:
(3) The ALCO shall be a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet
planning from risk - return perspective, including the strategic
management of interest rate and liquidity risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet planning from risk - return perspective, including the strategic management of interest rate a

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide on the role of its alco, its responsibility as also the decisions to be taken by it
controls.control_description:
Each bank shall decide on
the role of its ALCO, its responsibility as also the decisions to be taken by
it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide on the role of its alco, its responsibility as also the decisions to be taken by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the bank operates within the limits / parameters set by the board
controls.control_description:
The business and risk management strategy decided by the Top
Management of the bank shall ensure that the bank operates within the
limits / parameters set by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the bank operates within the limits / parameters set by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider, inter alia, include product pricing for both deposits and advances, desired maturity profile and mix of the incremental assets and liabiliti
controls.control_description:
(4) The business issues that the ALCO shall consider, inter alia, include
product pricing for both deposits and advances, desired maturity profile
and mix of the incremental assets and liabilities, other related matters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider, inter alia, include product pricing for both deposits and advances, desired maturity profile and mix of the incremental assets and liabiliti

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the results of and progress in implementation of the decisions made in the <image> previous meetings
controls.control_description:
In
addition to monitoring the risk levels of the bank, the ALCO shall review
the results of and progress in implementation of the decisions made in the
<image>
previous meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the results of and progress in implementation of the decisions made in the <image> previous meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure also articulate the current interest rate view of the bank and base its decisions for future business strategy on this view
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall also articulate the current interest rate
view of the bank and base its decisions for future business strategy on
this view.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also articulate the current interest rate view of the bank and base its decisions for future business strategy on this view

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for deciding on source and mix of liabilities or sale of assets
controls.control_description:
In respect of the funding policy, the ALCO shall be responsible
for deciding on source and mix of liabilities or sale of assets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for deciding on source and mix of liabilities or sale of assets

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop a view on future direction of interest rate movements and decide on funding mixes, including but not limited to fixed v/s
controls.control_description:
The ALCO
shall develop a view on future direction of interest rate movements and
decide on funding mixes, including but not limited to fixed v/s.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop a view on future direction of interest rate movements and decide on funding mixes, including but not limited to fixed v/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for analysing, monitoring and reporting the risk profiles to the alco
controls.control_description:
The ALM Support Groups consisting of operating staff shall be responsible for
analysing, monitoring and reporting the risk profiles to the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for analysing, monitoring and reporting the risk profiles to the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t
controls.control_description:
The Group
shall also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various
possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and
recommend the action needed to adhere to bank's internal limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as follows: (1) liquidity risk management
controls.control_description:
The scope of ALM function shall be as follows:
(1) Liquidity risk management;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as follows: (1) liquidity risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure measure its liquidity positions on an ongoing basis and also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions
controls.control_description:
A bank's Top Management shall measure its liquidity positions on an ongoing
basis and also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under
different assumptions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measure its liquidity positions on an ongoing basis and also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be tracked through maturity or cash flow mismatches, through use of a maturity ladder and calculation of cumulative surplus or deficit of funds at sel
controls.control_description:
Liquidity shall be tracked through maturity or cash flow
mismatches, through use of a maturity ladder and calculation of cumulative
surplus or deficit of funds at selected maturity dates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be tracked through maturity or cash flow mismatches, through use of a maturity ladder and calculation of cumulative surplus or deficit of funds at sel

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the sls on a daily basis as per format provided under
controls.control_description: A bank shall prepare the SLS on a daily basis as per format provided under
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare the sls on a daily basis as per format provided under

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for measuring the future cash flows of the bank in different time buckets
controls.control_description:
The maturity profile as given in Annex-IV shall be used for measuring the future
cash flows of the bank in different time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for measuring the future cash flows of the bank in different time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed as under: (1) next day
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed as under: (1) next day

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed according to the expected timing of cash flows
controls.control_description:
All cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder shall be placed according to
the expected timing of cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed according to the expected timing of cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow
controls.control_description:
A maturing liability shall be a cash outflow
while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account the rupee inflows and outflows on account of forex operations
controls.control_description:
A bank shall take into account the
Rupee inflows and outflows on account of forex operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take into account the rupee inflows and outflows on account of forex operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure make appropriate assumptions according to its asset - liability profiles
controls.control_description:
While determining
<image>
the likely cash inflows / outflows, the bank shall make appropriate assumptions
according to its asset - liability profiles.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make appropriate assumptions according to its asset - liability profiles

controls.control_objective: To ensure closely monitor the short-term mismatches, i
controls.control_description:
While the mismatches upto one year provide early warning signals of
impending liquidity problems, the bank shall closely monitor the short-term
mismatches, i.e., upto 28 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to closely monitor the short-term mismatches, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 5 per cent, 10 per cent, 15 per cent, and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash outflows in the respective time buckets
controls.control_description:
The net cumulative negative mismatches during
the Next day, 2-7 days, 8-14 days, and 15-28 days buckets shall not exceed 5
per cent, 10 per cent, 15 per cent, and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash
outflows in the respective time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 5 per cent, 10 per cent, 15 per cent, and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash outflows in the respective time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the board /
controls.control_description:
A bank shall monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time
buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the Board /
Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor its cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets by establishing internal prudential limits with the approval of the board /

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account all relevant factors based on its asset-liability base, nature of business, future strategy, etc
controls.control_description:
While determining the tolerance levels the bank shall
take into account all relevant factors based on its asset-liability base, nature of
business, future strategy, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take into account all relevant factors based on its asset-liability base, nature of business, future strategy, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity
controls.control_description:
The investments in SLR securities and other investments shall be shown under
respective maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to show these securities under 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the basis of the defeasance period
controls.control_description:
A bank maintaining the Held for Trading (HFT) portfolio in accordance with the
Reserve Bank of India (Local Area Banks - Classification, Valuation and
Operation of Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025 shall be permitted to show
these securities under 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the
basis of the defeasance period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to show these securities under 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days buckets on the basis of the defeasance period

controls.control_objective: To ensure estimate its short-term liquidity profiles on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes
controls.control_description:
In order to monitor its short-term liquidity on a dynamic basis over a time
horizon spanning from 1-90 days, a bank may estimate its short-term liquidity
profiles on the basis of business projections and other commitments for
planning purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to estimate its short-term liquidity profiles on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 200 per cent of its net worth as on march 31 of the previous year
controls.control_description:
Inter-bank Liability (IBL) Limit
(1) IBL of a bank shall not exceed 200 per cent of its Net Worth as on March
31 of the previous year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 200 per cent of its net worth as on march 31 of the previous year

controls.control_objective: To ensure , with the approval of its board, fix a lower limit for its ibl, keeping in view its business requirements
controls.control_description:
A bank may, with the approval of its Board, fix a
lower limit for its IBL, keeping in view its business requirements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to , with the approval of its board, fix a lower limit for its ibl, keeping in view its business requirements

controls.control_objective: To ensure include only fund-based ibl within india, including inter-bank liabilities in foreign currency to a bank operating within india
controls.control_description:
(3) The limit prescribed above shall include only fund-based IBL within India,
including inter-bank liabilities in foreign currency to a bank operating
within India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include only fund-based ibl within india, including inter-bank liabilities in foreign currency to a bank operating within india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be excluded
controls.control_description: The IBL outside India shall be excluded.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be excluded

controls.control_objective: To ensure include collateralized borrowings under tri-party repo (treps) and refinance from nabard, sidbi, etc
controls.control_description:
(4) The IBL limits shall not include collateralized borrowings under Tri-Party
Repo (TREPS) and refinance from NABARD, SIDBI, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include collateralized borrowings under tri-party repo (treps) and refinance from nabard, sidbi, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame suitable policies to monitor volatile liabilities and contain the liquidity risk arising out of excessive dependence on such deposits, both in n
controls.control_description:
A bank having high concentration of wholesale deposits or deposits in excess
of threshold as approved by the Board shall frame suitable policies to monitor
volatile liabilities and contain the liquidity risk arising out of excessive
dependence on such deposits, both in normal and stress situations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to frame suitable policies to monitor volatile liabilities and contain the liquidity risk arising out of excessive dependence on such deposits, both in n

controls.control_objective: To ensure manage its mismatched currency position as it not only exposes the balance sheet to movements in exchange rate, but also exposes it to country risk an
controls.control_description:
A bank shall manage its mismatched currency position as it not only exposes
the balance sheet to movements in exchange rate, but also exposes it to
country risk and settlement risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to manage its mismatched currency position as it not only exposes the balance sheet to movements in exchange rate, but also exposes it to country risk an

controls.control_objective: To ensure set gap limits and also adopt value at risk (var) approach to measure the risk associated with forward exposures
controls.control_description:
A bank with Authorised Dealer (AD) license shall set gap limits and also adopt
Value at Risk (VaR) approach to measure the risk associated with forward
exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set gap limits and also adopt value at risk (var) approach to measure the risk associated with forward exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the traditional gap analysis (tga) to measure the irr
controls.control_description: A bank shall use the Traditional Gap Analysis (TGA) to measure the IRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the traditional gap analysis (tga) to measure the irr

controls.control_objective: To ensure measurement of 'gap', i
controls.control_description:
Gap analysis means measurement of 'Gap', i.e., mismatches between rate
sensitive liabilities (RSL) and rate sensitive assets (RSA) (including off-balance
sheet positions) through a Gap Report generated by grouping rate sensitive
liabilities, assets and off-balance sheet positions into time buckets according to
residual maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measurement of 'gap', i

controls.control_objective: To ensure ascertain gap or mismatch risk as at a given date by calculating gaps, i
controls.control_description:
Under TGA, a bank shall ascertain Gap or Mismatch risk as at a given date by
calculating Gaps, i.e., mismatches between rate sensitive liabilities and rate
sensitive assets (including off-balance sheet positions, by preparing Interest
Rate Sensitivity (IRS) statement provided in Annex-III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ascertain gap or mismatch risk as at a given date by calculating gaps, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified in the format of irs statement as provided in annex-iii, based on guidance provided in annex-v
controls.control_description:
The various items of rate sensitive assets and liabilities and off-balance sheet
items shall be classified in the format of IRS statement as provided in Annex-III,
based on guidance provided in Annex-V.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified in the format of irs statement as provided in annex-iii, based on guidance provided in annex-v

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified in the following time buckets: (1) 1-28 days <image> (2) 29 days and upto 3 months (3) over 3 months and upto 6 months (4) over 6 months
controls.control_description:
The Gaps shall be identified in the
following time buckets:
(1) 1-28 days
<image>
(2) 29 days and upto 3 months
(3) Over 3 months and upto 6 months
(4) Over 6 months and upto 1 year
(5) Over 1 year and upto 3 years
(6) Over 3 years and upto 5 years
(7) Over 5 years
(8) Non-sensitive
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified in the following time buckets: (1) 1-28 days <image> (2) 29 days and upto 3 months (3) over 3 months and upto 6 months (4) over 6 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board / management committee
controls.control_description:
(2) A bank shall set prudential limits on individual Gaps with the approval of the
Board / Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board / management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a bearing on the total assets, earning assets or equity
controls.control_description:
The prudential limits shall have a bearing on
the Total Assets, Earning Assets or Equity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a bearing on the total assets, earning assets or equity

controls.control_objective: To ensure also work out ear or nim based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with the approval of the board / management committee
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also work out EaR or
NIM based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with
the approval of the Board / Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also work out ear or nim based on its views on interest rate movements and fix a prudent level with the approval of the board / management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the benchmark
controls.control_description:
The classification of various components of assets and liabilities into different
time buckets for preparation of Gap reports (Liquidity and Interest Rate
Sensitivity) as indicated in Annex-IV & Annex-V shall be the benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify them in the appropriate time buckets
controls.control_description:
A bank
which is better equipped to reasonably estimate the behavioural pattern,
embedded options, rolls-in and rolls-out, and other aspects of various
components of assets and liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies
shall classify them in the appropriate time buckets, subject to approval from the
ALCO / Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify them in the appropriate time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sent to the department of supervision (dos), rbi
controls.control_description:
A copy of the note approved by the ALCO / Board shall be sent
to the Department of Supervision (DoS), RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sent to the department of supervision (dos), rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure evolve suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities and off-bal
controls.control_description:
Given that the magnitude of embedded option risk in times of volatility in market
interest rates is quite substantial, a bank shall evolve suitable mechanism,
supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis to estimate the future
behaviour of assets, liabilities and off-balance sheet items to changes in market
variables and estimate the embedded options.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evolve suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets, liabilities and off-bal

controls.control_objective: To ensure implement scientifically evolved itp model as part of the alm system
controls.control_description:
A bank shall implement scientifically evolved ITP model as part of the ALM
system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to implement scientifically evolved itp model as part of the alm system

controls.control_objective: To ensure assign values on the basis of current market rates to funds provided and funds used
controls.control_description:
The transfer pricing mechanism shall assign values on the basis of
current market rates to funds provided and funds used.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assign values on the basis of current market rates to funds provided and funds used

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate management of margins, including lending / credit spread, funding / liability spread, and mismatch spread
controls.control_description:
The transfer price
mechanism shall facilitate management of margins, including lending / credit
spread, funding / liability spread, and mismatch spread.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate management of margins, including lending / credit spread, funding / liability spread, and mismatch spread

controls.control_objective: To ensure centralise irr for effective control and management of irr and provide a rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities
controls.control_description:
The ITP mechanism
shall centralise IRR for effective control and management of IRR and provide a
rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to centralise irr for effective control and management of irr and provide a rational framework for pricing of assets and liabilities

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the sls on a daily basis and put up to alco / top management
controls.control_description:
A bank shall prepare the SLS on a daily basis and put up to ALCO / Top
Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare the sls on a daily basis and put up to alco / top management

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared on a monthly basis and submitted to the alco / top management
controls.control_description:
For reporting INR rate sensitive assets, liabilities and off-balance sheet
positions, the IRS statement shall be prepared on a monthly basis and
submitted to the ALCO / Top Management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared on a monthly basis and submitted to the alco / top management

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be placed before the bank's board in the next meeting
controls.control_description:
It should also be placed before the
bank's Board in the next meeting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be placed before the bank's board in the next meeting

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed
controls.control_description:
Top Management / Board shall formulate
corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate corrective measures and devise suitable strategies wherever needed

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit sls to dos, rbi, on fortnightly basis (first and third wednesday of every month) and irs statement on a monthly basis
controls.control_description:
A bank shall submit SLS to DoS, RBI, on fortnightly basis (first and third
Wednesday of every month) and IRS statement on a monthly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit sls to dos, rbi, on fortnightly basis (first and third wednesday of every month) and irs statement on a monthly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and
guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or Directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
<image>
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified into volatile and core portions
controls.control_description:
Demand Deposits (Current and Savings Bank Deposits)
Savings Bank and Current Deposits may be classified into volatile and core portions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified into volatile and core portions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as volatile
controls.control_description: This portion may be treated as volatile.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as volatile

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 1- 3 years bucket
controls.control_description: While volatile portion can be placed in the Day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days time buckets, depending upon the experience and estimates of banks and the core portion may be placed in over 1- 3 years bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 1- 3 years bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: However, the wholesale deposits should be shown under respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ₹15 lakhs or any such higher threshold approved by the bank's board)
controls.control_description: (such deposits for the purpose of this statement may be ₹15 Lakhs or any such higher threshold approved by the bank's Board).
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be ₹15 lakhs or any such higher threshold approved by the bank's board)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as the maturity date/s and the amount should be shown in the respective time buckets
controls.control_description: Where call / put options are built into the issue structure of any instrument/s, the call / put date/s should be reckoned as the maturity date/s and the amount should be shown in the respective time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as the maturity date/s and the amount should be shown in the respective time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: which are known to the banks and any other contingency may be shown under respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported against "outflows - others"
controls.control_description: The event cash outflows, including incremental SLR requirement should be reported against "Outflows - Others".
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported against "outflows - others"

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates
controls.control_description: (ii) All overdue liabilities may be placed in the Day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in day 1, 2-7 days and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates
controls.control_description:
(iii) Interest and instalments from advances and investments, which are overdue for less than one month may be placed in
Day 1, 2-7 days and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in day 1, 2-7 days and 8-14 days buckets, based on behavioural estimates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in '29 days to 3 months bucket' if the earlier receivables remain uncollected
controls.control_description: Further, interest and instalments due (before classification as NPAs) may be placed in '29 days to 3 months bucket' if the earlier receivables remain uncollected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in '29 days to 3 months bucket' if the earlier receivables remain uncollected

controls.control_objective: To ensure show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits
controls.control_description:
Financing of Gap

In case the net cumulative negative mismatches during the Day 1, 2-7 days, 8-14 days, and 15- 28 days buckets exceed the prudential limit of 5 per cent ,10 per cent, 15 per cent, and 20 per cent of the cumulative cash outflows in the respective time buckets, the bank may show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under 'over 1-3 years' time bucket
controls.control_description: (i) Bills Payable (i) The core component which could reasonably be estimated on the basis of past data and behavioural pattern may be shown under 'Over 1-3 years' time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under 'over 1-3 years' time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, as per behavioural pattern
controls.control_description: The balance amount may be placed in Day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, as per behavioural pattern.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in day 1, 2-7 days, and 8-14 days buckets, as per behavioural pattern

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 5 years bucket
controls.control_description: Items not representing cash payables (i.e., income received in advance, etc.) may be placed in over 5 years bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 5 years bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under day 1 bucket, the statutory balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of dtl with
controls.control_description: Balances with RBI While the excess balance over the required CRR / SLR may be shown under Day 1 bucket, the Statutory Balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of DTL with a time-lag of 14 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under day 1 bucket, the statutory balances may be distributed amongst various time buckets corresponding to the maturity profile of dtl with

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under 'over 1-3 years' bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under day 1 bucket
controls.control_description: Balances with other Banks (i) Current Account (i) Non-withdrawable portion on account of stipulations of minimum balances may be shown under 'Over 1-3 years' bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under Day 1 bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under 'over 1-3 years' bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under day 1 bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 3-5 years bucket (sub-standard) or over 5 years bucket (doubtful)
controls.control_description: Investments classified as NPIs should be shown under over 3-5 years bucket (sub-standard) or over 5 years bucket (doubtful).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 3-5 years bucket (sub-standard) or over 5 years bucket (doubtful)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be netted from the gross investments provided provisions are held security-wise
controls.control_description: # Provisions may be netted from the gross investments provided provisions are held security-wise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be netted from the gross investments provided provisions are held security-wise

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in over 5 years bucket
controls.control_description: Otherwise provisions should be shown in over 5 years bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in over 5 years bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified
controls.control_description: (ii) Banks should undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under 'over 1-3 years' bucket
controls.control_description: While the volatile portion could be shown in the near-term maturity buckets, the core portion may be shown under 'Over 1-3 years' bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under 'over 1-3 years' bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: (iii) Term Loans (iii) Interim cash flows may be shown under respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: Fixed Assets / Assets on lease 'Over 5 years' bucket / Interim cash flows may be shown under respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in 'over 5 years' bucket
controls.control_description:
Other Assets

(i) Intangible assets Intangible assets and assets not representing cash receivables may be shown in 'Over 5 years' bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in 'over 5 years' bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under relevant maturity buckets upto 12 months
controls.control_description: (ii) Banks should undertake a study of the behavioural and seasonal pattern of potential availments in the accounts and the amounts so arrived at may be shown under relevant maturity buckets upto 12 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under relevant maturity buckets upto 12 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed amongst various time buckets
controls.control_description: Thus, historical trend analysis ought to be conducted on the devolvements and the amounts so arrived at in respect of outstanding Letters of Credit / Guarantees (net of margins) should be distributed amongst various time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed amongst various time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates
controls.control_description: The assets created out of devolvements may be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets on the basis of probable recovery dates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in over 3-6 months bucket
controls.control_description: This may be included in over 3-6 months bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in over 3-6 months bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in non- sensitive bucket
controls.control_description: The non-interest paying portion may be shown in non- sensitive bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in non- sensitive bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to different buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to different buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to different buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under the time bucket when deposits contractually become due for repricing
controls.control_description: However, in case of floating rate term deposits, the amounts may be shown under the time bucket when deposits contractually become due for repricing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under the time bucket when deposits contractually become due for repricing

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to different buckets on the basis of remaining maturity
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to different buckets on the basis of remaining maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to different buckets on the basis of remaining maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the appropriate bucket which refers to the repricing date
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the appropriate bucket which refers to the repricing date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the appropriate bucket which refers to the repricing date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity <image> swaps (buy / sell) etc
controls.control_description:
Repos / Bills Re-discounted (DUPN), Reprices only on maturity and should be distributed to the respective maturity
<image>
Swaps (Buy / Sell) etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity <image> swaps (buy / sell) etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in over 3 - 6 months bucket
controls.control_description: Balances with RBI Interest earning portion may be shown in over 3 - 6 months bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in over 3 - 6 months bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure foresee the direction of interest rate movements of funding options and capture the amounts in the respective maturity buckets which coincides with th
controls.control_description: Thus, each bank should foresee the direction of interest rate movements of funding options and capture the amounts in the respective maturity buckets which coincides with the time taken by banks to effect changes in PLR in response to changes in market interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to foresee the direction of interest rate movements of funding options and capture the amounts in the respective maturity buckets which coincides with th

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity buckets corresponding to the cash flow dates
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the respective maturity buckets corresponding to the cash flow dates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity buckets corresponding to the cash flow dates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed under different buckets with reference to maturity
controls.control_description:
Other products (Interest Rate)

i) Swaps Sensitive and should be distributed under different buckets with reference to maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed under different buckets with reference to maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be suitably classified as and when introduced
controls.control_description: ii) Other Derivatives Should be suitably classified as and when introduced.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be suitably classified as and when introduced
